knowledge_points.name: 见面问候与自我介绍句型
knowledge_points.description: 运用Hello/Hi打招呼，并使用I'm...或My name's...介绍自己及询问他人姓名

knowledge_points.name: 常用学习用品词汇识记
knowledge_points.description: 听、说、认读ruler, eraser, pencil, crayon, bag, pen, book等常用文具单词

knowledge_points.name: 物品持有表达句型
knowledge_points.description: 掌握I have a/an...句型，注意冠词a与an在元辅音开头的名词前的用法区别

knowledge_points.name: 介绍他人与社交礼仪
knowledge_points.description: 使用This is...介绍第三方，并运用Nice to meet you及相应答语进行礼貌社交

knowledge_points.name: 颜色词汇与色彩感知
knowledge_points.description: 识别并表述red, yellow, green, blue, black, white, orange, brown等颜色词汇

knowledge_points.name: 字母Aa至Dd的音形辨析
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母Aa-Dd的正确书写规范、发音，以及代表单词如apple, ant等

knowledge_points.name: 健康状况询问与回应
knowledge_points.description: 询问他人状况How are you?及其回应I'm fine, thank you/Very well, thanks

knowledge_points.name: 身体部位词汇识记
knowledge_points.description: 掌握eye, ear, nose, mouth, face, head, hand, arm, leg, foot等部位单词

knowledge_points.name: 身体动作指令表达
knowledge_points.description: 听懂并执行身体动作指令，如Touch your nose, Clap your hands等

knowledge_points.name: 字母Ee至Ii的音形辨析
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母Ee-Ii的读音、书写及对应单词如egg, elephant, fish等

knowledge_points.name: 动物词汇识记
knowledge_points.description: 听、说、认读panda, elephant, tiger, monkey, bird, duck, pig等常见动物单词

knowledge_points.name: 物体的辨认与指示
knowledge_points.description: 运用What's this?和What's that?询问近处和远处的物体并用It's a...回答

knowledge_points.name: 字母Jj至Nn的音形辨析
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母Jj-Nn的书写规则及其在单词首位的发音规律

knowledge_points.name: 食物词汇识记
knowledge_points.description: 掌握milk, bread, juice, egg, fish, rice, water, cake等食物类词汇

knowledge_points.name: 表达饮食需求与礼貌用语
knowledge_points.description: 熟练运用I'd like some...及Can I have some...等句型索要食物并表达感谢

knowledge_points.name: 字母Oo至Tt的音形辨析
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母Oo-Tt的大小写书写及其对应单词的发音识别

knowledge_points.name: 数字6-10的认读与应用
knowledge_points.description: 掌握基数词six, seven, eight, nine, ten的词形、词义与数量关系

knowledge_points.name: 年龄询问与生日祝福
knowledge_points.description: 运用How old are you?询问年龄，以及Happy birthday!进行节日祝贺

knowledge_points.name: 字母Uu至Zz的音形辨析
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母Uu-Zz的书写规范，并识别以这些字母开头的常见词汇词首音
